sourcesContent: import React from 'react' const variants = { default: 'bg-bg-elevated text-txt-secondary', success: 'bg-success/15 text-success', warning: 'bg-warning/15 text-warning', danger: 'bg-danger/15 text-danger', info: 'bg-info/15 text-info', accent: 'bg-accent-primary/15 text-accent-secondary', } const statusMap = { pending: 'warning', confirmed: 'info', shipped: 'accent', delivered: 'success', cancelled: 'danger', paid: 'success', unpaid: 'warning', overdue: 'danger', prospect: 'default', lead: 'info', active: 'success', vip: 'accent', churned: 'danger', sent: 'info', opened: 'accent', done: 'success', skipped: 'default', interested: 'success', ordered: 'success', no_response: 'warning', not_interested: 'danger', awareness: 'default', interest: 'info', decision: 'warning', won: 'success', lost: 'danger', inbound: 'info', outbound: 'accent', inquiry: 'info', order: 'success', complaint: 'danger', followup: 'warning', other: 'default', } export default function Badge({ children, variant, status }) { const v = variant || statusMap[children?.toString().toLowerCase()] || statusMap[status] || 'default' return ( {children} ) }
